column8: We (give) a lot of advice by our parents.

column10: You’ll have your copy soon, the contract (type).

column12: Lots of people (operate on) in this clinic. And now unfortunately my uncle John (operate) on here.
column14: What are you doing here in the hall? – My room (clean).
column15: Can you hear footsteps behind? We (follow).
column17: He is such a nice chap. Why he so often (laugh at)?
